---
id: authorization-group-role-assignments-controller-replace-group-role-assignments
title: "Replace all role assignments for a group"
description: "Replace all role assignments for a group with the provided list. Existing assignments not in the list will be removed."
sidebar_label: "Replace all role assignments for a group"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Replace all role assignments for a group"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/authorization/groups/{group_id}/role_assignments"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Replace all role assignments for a group with the provided list. Existing assignments not in the list will be removed.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
